    Class PropertyBuilder<TProperty>

    Configures the serialization rules for a specific property or field.

    Inheritance
    object
    PropertyBuilder<TProperty>
    Inherited Members
    object.Equals(object)
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.GetHashCode()

    Namespace: FluentJson.Core.Builder
    Assembly: FluentJson.Core.dll
    Syntax
    public class PropertyBuilder<TProperty>
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TProperty

    The type of the mapped member.

    Methods

    | Edit this page View Source

    HasConversion<TUnwrapped>(Func<TProperty, TUnwrapped>, Func<TUnwrapped, TProperty>)

    Configures how a complex property should be flattened or converted into a scalar primitive during serialization, and vice versa.

    Declaration
    public PropertyBuilder<TProperty> HasConversion<TUnwrapped>(Func<TProperty, TUnwrapped> serialize, Func<TUnwrapped, TProperty> deserialize)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Func<TProperty, TUnwrapped> serialize

    A delegate to unwrap the value for serialization.
    Func<TUnwrapped, TProperty> deserialize

    A delegate to wrap the value after deserialization.
    Returns
    Type Description
    PropertyBuilder<TProperty>

    The same builder instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TUnwrapped

    The primitive type this property will be converted to in the JSON payload.
    | Edit this page View Source

    HasName(string)

    Overrides the default JSON property name (which is the member's name) with a custom string.

    Declaration
    public PropertyBuilder<TProperty> HasName(string jsonName)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    string jsonName

    The custom JSON name to use.
    Returns
    Type Description
    PropertyBuilder<TProperty>

    The same builder instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
    | Edit this page View Source

    Ignore(bool)

    Instructs the framework to completely ignore this member during serialization and deserialization.

    Declaration
    public PropertyBuilder<TProperty> Ignore(bool ignored = true)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    bool ignored

    If true, the member is ignored. Defaults to true.
    Returns
    Type Description
    PropertyBuilder<TProperty>

    The same builder instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
    | Edit this page View Source

    IsRequired(bool)

    Marks the property as required during deserialization.

    Declaration
    public PropertyBuilder<TProperty> IsRequired(bool required = true)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    bool required

    If true, the property is required. Defaults to true.
    Returns

    The same builder instance so that multiple calls can be chained.
